# spec-mock-go-sdk

> Prototype Go SDK generated by the Deepgram Smithy spec pipeline. Ships machine-generated wire types in `api/` from `spec-codegen-go` and an idiomatic Go facade in `pkg/` maintained by the `spec-idiomatic` agentic runner. Listen is the only product wired today; others return per-product as each migrates into the pipeline.

## Architecture

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): repo layout, edit policy per directory, how a change lands, skill index, substrate philosophy
- [README.md](README.md): top-level overview, runtime support, contribution guide

## Maintainer skills

- [sdk-codegen-flow](.agents/skills/sdk-codegen-flow/SKILL.md): the four-repo pipeline (spec → spec-codegen-go → spec-mock-go-sdk → spec-idiomatic), what spec-idiomatic does on api/ PRs, when to edit pkg/ directly
- [sdk-facade-conventions](.agents/skills/sdk-facade-conventions/SKILL.md): repo-local Go layout for pkg/ — co-located options + response/events + converters + client per transport
- [sdk-agentic-readiness](.agents/skills/sdk-agentic-readiness/SKILL.md): the five objectives for scoring well on agentic retrieval tools, mapped to Go — Example_* tests, single-concept files, keyword-dense README opener, curated llms.txt
- [sdk-local-regen](.agents/skills/sdk-local-regen/SKILL.md): running spec-idiomatic on your laptop against a synthetic api/ change without involving CI
- [sdk-pr-review](.agents/skills/sdk-pr-review/SKILL.md): checklist for verifying an auto-regen PR did the right thing, signs the bot got it wrong, when to push back

Universal facade-author rules (3-tier breaking model, converter naming, additive rule, facade-mirror rule, wire-test contract, BREAKING_CHANGES.md ownership) live in [spec-idiomatic/prompts/system.md](https://github.com/deepgram/spec-idiomatic/blob/main/prompts/system.md).

## Examples

Canonical examples live as `Example_*` functions in `*_test.go` files alongside the source they document. Each one is runnable via `go test ./...` and visible in `go doc` and pkg.go.dev.

- [REST client construction](pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/example_test.go): `ExampleNewWithDefaults`
- [REST options struct](pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/example_test.go): `ExamplePreRecordedTranscriptionOptions`
- [WebSocket client construction](pkg/client/listen/v1/websocket/example_test.go): `ExampleNewWithDefaults`
- [WebSocket options struct](pkg/client/listen/v1/websocket/example_test.go): `ExampleLiveTranscriptionOptions`

## Related repos

- [deepgram/spec](https://github.com/deepgram/spec): Smithy IDL source of truth
- [deepgram/spec-codegen-go](https://github.com/deepgram/spec-codegen-go): Java SmithyBuildPlugin that emits api/
- [deepgram/spec-idiomatic](https://github.com/deepgram/spec-idiomatic): agentic facade regenerator

## Optional

- [BRANCH_AND_RELEASE_PROCESS.md](.github/BRANCH_AND_RELEASE_PROCESS.md): release branch and semver bump conventions
- [PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md](.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md): PR template including the breaking-change checkbox
